title: Senior Fleet Manager at Smartr Logistics

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Smartr Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Smartr Logistics! We are hiring a Fleet Manager for our Ludhiana team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Smartr Logistics:
Smartr Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Smartr Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
